title: need  list-repo  command
body: Can a new list-repo feature be added to list all repositories in registry or harbor

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

That’s not a feature of the cross-vendor distribution API; it would have to be a specific Harbor client (_if_ Harbor has that feature). That’s not entirely out of the question, but, also, not something Skopeo has traditionally done.

Also, “all repositories in a registry” is something useful primarily for an administrator of that registry; it would need to be something like “repositories available to a specific user account”, and that goes even deeper into product specifics.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
